summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. AI Enhanced Value Fund (AIVL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides exposure to US value stocks from developed markets. AIVL was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: AI can do a lot of things — like tearing down your stock portfolio and adding risk
data.text: New study shows AI stock-trading tools lagged a basic S&P 500 fund. AI-powered ETFs have similar results.

news.t: AI can do a lot of things — like tearing down your stock portfolio and adding risk

holdings.infoBox: AIVL is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 4.92%, Bank of America at 3.66%, Ciena at 3.35%, Altria Group at 3.20%, and The Procter & Gamble Company at 3.14%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
